name: Lang's Crunchy Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter and milk in a large, heavy pot.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
3. Be very careful not to burn the mixture.
4. Cook until it forms a firm ball when tested in cold water (about 15 minutes of boiling).
5. Remove from heat and stir in marshmallow cream and peanut butter.
6. Pour into a 9x12 buttered pan.
7. Allow to partially set, then cut into serving size pieces.
8. Let fully set before serving.
This is the original recipe. Adding an extra jar of crunchy peanut butter still makes an excellent fudge which is more peanut buttery and less sweet.
